extension_description.message: Type in Korean (Hangul) in your browser. Includes a romanization tool and an on-screen keyboard.

romanize_popup_romanizedTextTextboxHint.message: The romanized version will appear here

keyboard_key_controlRight_tooltip.message: Convert the selected Hangul to Hanja

keyboard_resize.message: Drag to resize; double-click to reset

options_hanYong_disabled_hint.message: When off, all Han/Yong switching is disabled and the toggle key does nothing.

options_hanYong_toggleKey_description.message: The key or combination that switches between Hangul and English. The default is Right Command on Mac and Right Alt elsewhere, and it is saved on this computer only.

options_keyBinding_hint.message: Press your key or combination. A normal key must be combined with Ctrl or Alt. Press Esc to cancel.

options_keyBinding_hint_mac.message: Press your key or combination. On Mac, Command, Control, or Option can be used by itself. A normal key must include Control or Option; Command may be added. Press Esc to cancel.

options_keyBinding_invalid.message: A normal key must be combined with Ctrl or Alt.

options_keyBinding_invalid_mac.message: Use Command, Control, or Option by itself, or include Control or Option with a normal key.

options_hanYong_syncAcrossTabs_descripti.message: Switch between Hangul and English in one tab and every tab follows. When off, each tab keeps its own mode.

options_hanYong_hint.message: Switches between Hangul and Latin input.

options_hanja_hint.message: Converts Hangul syllables to Hanja candidates.

options_hanja_disabled_hint.message: When off, the Hanja conversion key does nothing.

options_hanja_conversionKey_description.message: The key or combination that opens Hanja candidates. The default is Right Option on Mac and Right Ctrl elsewhere, and it is saved on this computer only.

options_hanja_showSimplified_description.message: Show the Simplified Chinese form beside each Hanja candidate when available.

options_hanja_showPinyin_description.message: Show Mandarin pinyin beside each Hanja candidate when available.

options_keyBinding_hanYongUnbound.message: $key$ was unbound from the Han/Yong toggle key.

options_keyBinding_hanjaUnbound.message: $key$ was unbound from the Hanja conversion key.

options_onScreenKeyboard_syncAcrossTabs_.message: Show or hide the on-screen keyboard in one tab and every tab follows. When off, each tab controls its own.

gettingStarted_intro.message: Choose whether this extension should type Hangul in web pages, or stay out of the way while you use the other tools.

gettingStarted_question.message: How will you use this extension?

gettingStarted_choiceTypeHangul_label.message: Type Hangul in web pages with this extension

gettingStarted_choiceTypeHangul_descript.message: Enables Korean typing mode so the extension turns typed keys into Hangul in web pages.

gettingStarted_choiceOtherTools_descript.message: Disables Korean typing mode so the extension will not unexpectedly switch web-page typing into Hangul.

gettingStarted_noticeOtherTools.message: Korean typing mode is off. The extension will not switch web-page typing into Hangul. You can still use the other tools, and you can turn Korean typing back on later in Options.

gettingStarted_notice.message: Korean typing mode is enabled. Press Right Alt to turn Hangul typing on or off in the current tab. You can also click the extension icon.

gettingStarted_notice_mac.message: Korean typing mode is enabled. Press Right Command to turn Hangul typing on or off in the current tab. You can also click the extension icon.

gettingStarted_errorLoad.message: Settings could not be loaded. Open Options and try again.

gettingStarted_showIcon_chrome.message: Prefer a visible button? In Chrome, click the Extensions puzzle-piece icon, find Korean IME, then click the pin icon. Click the extension icon to switch between English and Hangul.

gettingStarted_showIcon_firefox.message: Prefer a visible button? In Firefox, click the extensions button, find Korean IME, then use its menu to pin it to the toolbar. Click the extension icon to switch between English and Hangul.

gettingStarted_showIcon_showVideo.message: Show me how to pin it

gettingStarted_showIcon_videoLabel.message: Video showing how to pin the Korean IME extension icon

gettingStarted_about_typingMode.message: Korean typing mode turns keyboard-layout input into Hangul.

gettingStarted_about_romanization.message: Romanization tools convert existing Hangul to Latin letters.

gettingStarted_about_layoutExample.message: With the Korean Dubeolsik (두벌식) keyboard layout, dkssudgktpdy produces 안녕하세요.
